parameters.name: list_libraries
parameters.description: List all accessible Seafile libraries/repos. Parameters: type (filter: mine, shared, group, or org — optional)

value.type: ={{ $fromAI('type', 'Filter libraries: mine, shared, group, or org (optional, leave empty for all)', 'string') }}

parameters.name: list_directory
parameters.description: List files and folders in a Seafile library directory. Parameters: repo_id (library ID, required), path (directory path, optional, default '/')

parameters.name: get_file_detail
parameters.description: Get metadata for a file in a Seafile library (size, last modified, etc.). Parameters: repo_id (library ID, required), path (file path, required)

parameters.name: download_file
parameters.description: Get a file download link or read text file content inline. For text files (.txt, .md, .json, .csv, etc.) returns content directly. For binary files returns a download URL. Parameters: repo_id (library ID, required), path (file path, required)

parameters.name: search_files
parameters.description: Search for files across Seafile libraries by keyword. Parameters: query (search keywords, required), search_repo (library ID to search in, optional — omit to search all), per_page (results per page, optional)

value.search_repo: ={{ $fromAI('search_repo', 'Library ID to search in (optional, omit for all)', 'string') }}

parameters.name: create_share_link
parameters.description: Create a public share link for a file or folder in Seafile. Parameters: repo_id (library ID, required), path (file/folder path, required), password (link password, optional), expire_days (expiration in days, optional)

parameters.name: delete_file
parameters.description: Delete a file or directory in a Seafile library. Parameters: repo_id (library ID, required), path (file/folder path, required)

parameters.name: file_operation
parameters.description: Rename, move, or copy a file in Seafile. Parameters: repo_id (library ID, required), path (source file path, required), operation ('rename', 'move', or 'copy', required). For rename: newname (new filename, required). For move/copy: dst_repo (destination library ID, required), dst_dir (destination directory path, required)
